articles.title: US Supreme Court allows Trump to withhold US$4 billion in foreign aid
articles.content: Ali's decision came in a lawsuit by aid groups challenging the administration's action. The Supreme Court has a 6-3 conservative majority, and the court's three liberal justices dissented. It also expressed concerns that ruling against Trump threatened to impair his power to conduct foreign affairs
